constraints: ALWAYS identify the specific location (city/region) before fetching data.
If location is not clear, ask for clarification.
Include current conditions and a 3-day forecast if available.

content.instruction: Execute blueprints.weather. Provide detailed weather information for the specified location.

blueprints.main:
graph TD
    Start[User Input: Location] --> Geocode[Identify City/Region]
    Geocode --> Fetch[Fetch Current Weather & Forecast]
    Fetch --> Analyze[Analyze Trends: Storms, Heat, etc.]
    Analyze --> Report[Generate Weather Report]
    Report --> End

Geocode.step1: Use google_search to find coordinates or verify city name.

Fetch.step1: Use web_search to retrieve current temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions.
Fetch.step2: Fetch 3-day forecast with high/low temperatures and precipitation probability.
Fetch.step3: Verify data completeness - if missing critical fields, flag for user.

Analyze.step1: Check for severe weather alerts or significant temperature changes.
Analyze.step3: Check air quality index (AQI) and UV index if available.

Report.step1: Format the findings into a user-friendly report with icons/emojis.
Report.step2: Structure: Location + Current Conditions + 3-Day Forecast + Alerts/Recommendations.
